calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Defendants Motion For Costs, Including Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Aug-12-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT KAUSHIK DATTANI and 363 VALENCIA, LLC's Motion For Costs, Including Attorneys Fees is GRANTED against Plaintiffs jointly and severally in the amount of $13,041.70 ($11,302.50 fees and $1,739.20 costs). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion And Defendants Motion For Costs, Including Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Continued To Aug-12-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KAUSHIK DATTANI and 363 VALENCIA'S Motion And Defendants Motion For Costs, Including Attorneys Fees is continued to August 12, 2015. Moving party to provide supplemental declaration with unredacted invoices no later than July 16, 2015. (Attorney-client and work product privileged information may be redacted. Notations such as "evaluated complaint, "researched motion to compel" and "attended the hearing" are not privileged). Plaintiffs may file an opposition limited to the supplemental declaration, not to exceed 5 pages, no later than July 30, 2015. Moving party may file a reply, not to exceed 5 pages, no later than August 5, 2015. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Defendants Motion For Costs, Including Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar May-22-2015 Continued To Jun-24-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances by either party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs KAUSHIK DATTANI and 363 VALENCIA, LLC's Motion For Costs and Attorneys Fees is Continued to June 24, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply to Department 501 no later than May 29, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.
Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.
